response:
The combat technique also known as Wushu Sanda that the character of Wu Jing is trained with in the 2006 Hong Kong martial arts film, written, produced, and directed by Dennis Law, is **Sanshou**.

This is explicitly stated in the context: "Fatal Contact (film): Fatal Contact () is a 2006 Hong Kong martial arts film written, produced and directed by Dennis Law, and starring Wu Jing, Ronald Cheng, Miki Yeung, Theresa Fu, Cheung Siu-fai, Ken Lo, Andy On, Lam Suet and Timmy Hung. Wu Jing played Kong Ko who is trained with the fighting techniques of Sanshou martial arts, and lured into the world of illegal martial arts fighting."
